name: updateTableRowStyle
description: Applies row-level styling to a Google Docs table, including minimum row height and optional pinned header rows.

documentId.description: The document ID — the long string between /d/ and /edit in a Google Docs URL.

tableId.description: The MCP table ID returned by listDocumentTables.

preventOverflow.description: Whether row content should avoid overflowing outside the row.

pinnedHeaderRowsCount.description: Optional number of header rows to pin at the top of the table.
